info.english_meaning: to nurture to nourish to maintainto promoteto bring upto support
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' DAraRe pozayet puzwO puzyet puzRAti pozati ' (Slo. 171) - devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pro tye agnayo'gnizu viSvaM puzyanti vAryam' (f॰5.6.6) praSabdaH prakarze pozasya kArtsnyamAha
